1.title: Status/timing envelope on TaskContext (Phase 1a)
1.evidence: Adds NodeStatus(StrEnum), NodeRun(BaseModel) and node_runs field to app/core/task.py; no prior task consumed.

2.title: Framework stamps the envelope in node_context (Phase 1b)
2.evidence: 'Add from core.task import NodeRun, NodeStatus to the existing ... line' and 'set the node's NodeRun to RUNNING' — consumes NodeRun/NodeStatus created in Task 1.

3.title: Injected progress callback on Workflow.run() (Phase 1c)
3.evidence: 'Edits app/core/workflow.py — same file as Step 2. Do Step 2 first.' and 'seed every node in the schema as PENDING in node_runs' (uses NodeRun from Task 1).

4.title: Worker wires persistence at each boundary (Phase 1d)
4.evidence: 'Pass it: workflow.run(db_event.data, on_progress=...)' — consumes the on_progress parameter added in Task 3.

5.title: Tests for Phase 1
5.evidence: 'node_runs transitions PENDING → RUNNING → SUCCESS' (Task 1/2), 'on_progress is invoked once before the first node and once per boundary' (Task 3), and 'Step 5 depends on 1–4' in the breakdown dependency summary.

6.title: Per-node token + cost capture (Phase 2)
6.evidence: 'Edits app/core/task.py (already has the usage field from Step 1.1 — no further edit needed there)' and 'Add the field to NodeRun in task.py' — depends on the usage field added by Task 1; breakdown summary '1 → 6'.

7.title: Workflow graph introspection endpoint (Phase 3)
7.evidence: 'No overlap with Steps 1–6.' and breakdown summary '7 (independent)' — reads existing WorkflowRegistry/WorkflowSchema only, no dependency on tasks 1–6.

8.title: Validate
8.evidence: 'Run the Validation Commands ... and confirm all pass ... collection count not decreased' and breakdown summary 'Step 8 depends on everything.'
